g.text: Connections (will be removed in the future, use global_connection)

div.p: yaml deploy_source: name: deploy lambda from source runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: checkout source code uses: actions/checkout@v3 - name: default deploy uses: appleboy/lambda-action@v0.1.7 with: aws_access_key_id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }} aws_secret_access_key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }} aws_region: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }} function_name: gorush source: example/index.js

g.title: Is used for Redshift as well

g.text: udp forward 发送给 udp client
发送ok字符串给 udp的请求端
发送给 ssh 所在的 udp forawrd
